drivers.label: Central Bank Instant Payment Mandate - Fast-track full integration into the national system.
Central Bank Instant Payment Mandate - Delay implementation to stabilize internal systems.
Central Bank Instant Payment Mandate - Do nothing for now.
Regional Data Breach at a Peer Bank - Launch a trust campaign and accelerate cybersecurity audits.
Regional Data Breach at a Peer Bank - Strengthen internal monitoring but stay quiet publicly.
